name: Feeble Origins: Path of a Hero
short_description: A classic fantasy adventure set in a hand-crafted, small open world. With grandpa’s old blade, you'll go on quests to secure the forest, hunt for upgrades in caves, and delve into old tombs as you uncover the plot threatening the village. Rise to become the hero the town never expected to show up.
detailed_description:
Feeble Origins is a small adventure with a retro tone that puts the spotlight on the melee class of adventurer and trades away the complexity of modern gaming for a classic feel. Instead of experience points and sprawling skill trees, your progression comes from meaningful gear upgrades, the story you uncover, and the world itself.

Begin Your Feeble Journey

Your travels have led you to Makestone, a quiet village perched on ruins so old only the Giants can pronounce them. Adventurers have chased its rumors for generations, and the few who return don’t offer much in the way of details. The abandoned loot they left behind is what brought you here in the first place. Now that you’ve arrived, it’s up to you to discover what lies beneath Makestone Village…and pick up whatever you can carry out along the way.

Explore at Your Own Pace

The world of Feeble Origins is non-linear and becomes more open the more you progress, letting you choose your path with each quest. Venture further into the woods, descend into crypts, or brave the caverns. Each location holds its own secrets, puzzles, and fragments of a deeper story.

Meaningful Loot

Every new weapon or armor piece is a meaningful upgrade, with each choice making a difference in gameplay style. Combat is straightforward but viscerally satisfying, with each swing, block, and dodge feeling earned.

Uncover the Mystery

With each quest, you'll uncover pieces of a growing mystery: Why are the dead rising? Who is behind it? And what lies beneath Makestone Village?

Nostalgia, Reimagined

Feeble Origins is built to evoke the warmth of retro RPGs--not through pixel-perfect imitation--but through tone, pacing, and simplicity. It's a game that respects your time, rewards your curiosity, and invites you to settle into its rhythm.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Ukrainian
